title: phreatia keysseri
intro: Phreatia keysseri is a species of orchid native to the Pacific Islands, specifically found in the Philippines and Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Phreatia keysseri are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in topical applications for its antiseptic properties.
